channel.title: Entertainment
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from Entertainment, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Princess Eugenie Spotted at Ski Resort in Switzerland Ahead of Ex-Prince Andrew's Arrest: Report
item.description: "Eugenie and Jack were with the children, the nanny and a group of friends," an onlooker told 'Hello!'

item.title: Why Rachael Ray Wanted Brooklyn Beckham to Co-Host Her Long-Running Event: ‘He's No Slouch in a Kitchen’ (Exclusive)
item.description: Beckham was representing his hot sauce brand, Cloud23, at Mike’s Amazing Burger Bash during the South Beach Wine & Food Festival

item.title: Kelly Clarkson Shares the 'Really Hard' Part of Ending Her Talk Show That 'Sucked'
item.description: Clarkson announced earlier this month that she was ending 'The Kelly Clarkson Show' after seven seasons in order to 'prioritize' her kids

item.title: Jodie Turner-Smith Says Taylor Swift Insisted She Bring Her Daughter Juno, 5, to ‘Opalite’ Music Video Set (Exclusive)
item.description: The 'Queen & Slim' actress shares her daughter with her ex-husband, Joshua Jackson

item.title: Selena Gomez Reacts to U.S. Figure Skater Alysa Liu Wearing Rare Beauty Lip Gloss at the 2026 Olympics
item.description: In a viral clip, the athlete is seen reaching for a Rare Beauty lip product on her way to accept her gold medal

item.title: Eric Dane's Candid Moments With TMZ Over the Years, on Video
item.description: Eric Dane’s death has left a massive hole in people's lives -- not just for his family, but across Hollywood -- and here at TMZ too, where he was a fa...

item.title: 'American Idol' Alum Caleb Flynn Arrested for Allegedly Murdering Wife
item.description: Caleb Flynn -- who auditioned for "American Idol" in 2013 -- is back in the limelight but for all the wrong reasons ... he's just been arrested for al...

item.title: LaMelo Ball Avoids Talking About Car Accident In First Game Back
item.description: LaMelo Ball addressed the media for the first time since his Wednesday accident in Uptown Charlotte -- which left his Hummer missing a wheel and a per...

item.title: Russell Westbrook’s Wife Gets Angry Fan's Email Wishing Them A Horrible Death
item.description: Russell Westbrook's wife, Nina, received a shocking email from an irate "fan" furious over her husband's performance on the court, calling her a "dumb...

item.title: Patrick Dempsey Reveals Final Communication With Eric Dane 1 Week Before Death
item.description: Patrick Dempsey is heartbroken over Eric Dane’s death ... revealing he’d spoken to his "Grey’s Anatomy" costar just a week before he passed -- and the...
